untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of parabolic acceleration in successive trend legs with increasing slope magnitude. This requires calculation of trend slope across multiple bars and comparison of slope magnitudes—functionality not available in provided indicators. Additionally, 'multiple bars completely outside Keltner Channel' requires counting consecutive bars outside bands, which cannot be expressed as a single 3-field condition. The signal's core logic depends on price action pattern recognition and slope acceleration analysis beyond the scope of allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Translated Keltner Channel reversion entry (price returning inside bands) using Bollinger Bands as closest substitute. Entry conditions capture price re-entry into bands. Exit conditions use band crossovers as reversion failure signals. Accelerating trend leg confirmation and exact bar-count requirements cannot be translated with available indicators and require custom pattern recognition logic.
